name: edustream-backend-render
description: Render Monolith Deployment for EduStream Microservices

scripts.postinstall: npm install --prefix shared && npm install --prefix gateway && npm install --prefix services/auth-service && npm install --prefix services/user-service && npm install --prefix services/course-service && npm install --prefix services/media-service && npm install --prefix services/payment-service && npm install --prefix services/notification-service && npm install --prefix services/review-service && npm install --prefix services/search-service
